content.en:
"Impossible, how can the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi become a true monarch and a true monarch???

The Mad True Monarch of Giant Axe City revealed an incredible look when he learned that Ye Tian had become the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, and he couldn't believe it at all.

I think that at the beginning, he was the first person in this universe to become a true monarch, how majestic he was at that time.

But now, although he has become a true monarch in the late stage of the True Spirit Realm, his strength is very average, and in the quasi-Dao realm, countless True Monarchs are stronger than him.

And the True Monarch List True Monarch is an existence that is difficult to look up to for him, so all of them have a record of drawing or killing weaker True Ancestors!

And what about the Ten Thousand Laws?

Previously, Ye Tian was trapped in the Heavenly Monarch level for hundreds of millions of years, and many Heavenly Monarchs surpassed him one by one, and he also looked down on Ye Tian, feeling that Ye Tian's potential was exhausted, and he had no advantage compared to other Dao Ancestor ancestors, and he was completely unworthy of being a Dao Ancestor lineage.

But now, Ye Tian has become a true monarch, and he doesn't know how many times stronger than him.

Such a huge gap made him difficult to accept, and even a little jealous.

......

Void Heaven Temple.

Pengyu Zhenjun, Swallowing Moon Zhenjun and others were more excited when they knew that Ye Tian had become a true monarch on the True Monarch List, after all, they had a good relationship with Ye Tian, and Ye Tian had become a true monarch on the True Monarch List, which was only good for them and had no harm.

But they were still surprised by Ye Tian's growth speed, it was simply too fast!

At the beginning, they really thought that Ye Tian was affected by the curse and was surpassed by others one by one, and they might not be able to afford it, but they didn't expect that after Ye Tian broke the curse, he would catch up with the others so quickly, and far surpass.

This kind of genius can no longer be described in words, it is too against the sky.

The territory of the True Monarch of Longhai.

At this time, Longhai Zhenjun also knew about Ye Tian becoming a true monarch on the True Monarch List, and he was immediately surprised.

Although Ye Tian had just stepped into the True Monarch List, and his strength was much worse than him, Ye Tian's cultivation in such a short period of time was really surprising to him.

"Shizun said that this little junior brother is very talented, above me, I still didn't believe it before, but now it seems that this little junior brother is really not simple!"

Long Hai Zhenjun said.

However, in his eyes, this little junior brother is just not simple, and it has not yet reached the level of frightening him.

Fast cultivation speed is nothing, fast growth speed is nothing, unless Ye Tian can surpass him, surpass other True Monarchs, and become the number one True Monarch on the list, that is the real horror, otherwise it is not very shocking.

As a Dao Ancestor, he has seen too many excellent geniuses, and the experiences of some geniuses even make him and many True Ancestors envious and jealous.

For example, some geniuses took advantage of great opportunities to cross the Heavenly Monarch and the True Monarch in one fell swoop in just tens of thousands of years, and directly became the True Ancestor, and it was not an ordinary True Ancestor, but a True Ancestor with an incomparably solid foundation.

There was even a peerless Tianjiao who became a true ancestor not long ago, and he became a Taoist ancestor in one fell swoop with the help of the ancestral monument.

There are too many cases he has seen or heard of, it is not uncommon for Ye Tian to improve his strength quickly, plus this time Ye Tian has also obtained a large number of innate origin things, it is not very surprising that there is such progress without a lack of resources.

Longhai Zhenjun didn't pay too much attention, but continued to participate in the cultivation of enlightenment.

This time, although he did not obtain the innate origin life, he also obtained many top-level innate origin things, and these cultivation innate origin things also had certain benefits for the Great Dao Prototype.

He wanted to try it and see if he could break the shackles and train to a 100,000-meter avenue.

----------

After Ye Tian became the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, he went to the Void Heaven Palace, and this time the eyes of many True Monarchs looking at Ye Tian changed.

Before, many True Monarchs looked at Ye Tian with contempt and jealousy, but this time they were respectful and fearful.

How powerful the True Monarch List True Monarch is, although there are tens of millions of True Monarchs in the Void Heaven Palace, these True Monarchs basically have no hope of becoming True Monarchs on the True Monarch List, after all, there are only a few True Monarchs on the True Monarch List among so many True Monarchs.

Before Ye Tian became the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, there were only three True Monarchs in the Void Heaven Palace.

Longhai Zhenjun is the most powerful True Monarch in the Void Heaven Palace, followed by Chenguang Zhenjun, and the last one is Guangyuan Zhenjun who has more than 800 True Monarchs on the True Monarch List.

There are a total of 1,000 places on the True Monarch List, and it is already very good that the Void Heaven Temple can occupy 3 places.

There are so many big forces in the quasi-Dao realm, many big forces don't even have a True Monarch List, of course, the Void Heaven Temple is not the strongest, such as the Chaos Commercial Bank, the Giant Axe City and other big forces are much stronger than the Void Heaven Palace, and there are naturally more True Monarchs on the True Monarch List who occupy it.

But now, Ye Tian has stepped into the ranks of the True Monarch List, and suddenly let the Void Heaven Hall have four True Monarch List, and the overall strength is much stronger.

What's more, many True Monarchs have been cultivating for countless years, and it is almost difficult for them to make progress, while Ye Tian is a new True Monarch List, and it has not been long since he became a True Monarch, there is still a lot of room for improvement.

Anyone can see that Ye Tian's limit is far from the end of the True Monarch List, but at the forefront.

This time, Ye Tian went out of the customs to relax, and secondly, to understand the situation of the human race.

Nowadays, the development of the human race is very strong, and there are a lot of true monarchs, although they are only weaker true monarchs, but at least they look better on the façade.

And under the accumulation of Ye Tian's countless resources, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu have also stepped into the mid-stage peak of the True Spirit Realm, but they are only stronger in cultivation, and they are still relatively weak in other aspects.

Ye Tian stayed in the Terran for a long time, and also instructed the cultivation of the high-level Terrans, and left some resources, so he entered the retreat again.

However, it had not been long before something big had happened in the Quasi-Path Realm.

......

In the chaotic region outside the Quasi-Path Boundary.

The incarnation of a famous Dao Ancestor was hidden here, paying attention to the situation in the Quasi-Dao Realm all the time, and for them, it didn't take much effort to leave an avatar to observe the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Usually, these avatars are basically in a state of sleep, leaving only a trace of mind, once something big happens in the quasi-Dao realm, these incarnations of them will wake up one by one.

Suddenly.

The Dao Ancestor incarnations in the void space opened their eyes one after another, and they all looked at the Quasi-Dao Realm.

In their perception, a strange aura appeared in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

"The aura of the realm has appeared, what's going on?"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was shocked.

Before, these Dao Ancestors had investigated many times, but they didn't find any domain aura in the Quasi-Dao Realm, although this was the fragmentation of the Quasi-Dao Realm, but the spirit of the Domain Realm had merged with the Quasi-Dao Realm, and it was no longer the spirit of the Quasi-Dao Realm, which meant that the Quasi-Dao Realm had completely lost the breath of the Realm.

But now, the aura of the realm has reappeared, and this breath is not the spirit of the realm at all, but the breath of the real realm relics.

This means that there are things or ruins or buildings about the domain realm in the quasi-Dao realm, in short, something that is enough to make the Dao Ancestors' hearts move.
